statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir"); display_dir=$(echo "$dir" | sed "s|^$HOME|~|"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".model.display_name"); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.used_percentage // empty"); size=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.context_window_size // empty"); size_fmt=""; if [ -n "$size" ]; then size_fmt=$(awk -v n="$size" "BEGIN{if (n>=1000000) printf \"%.1fM\", n/1000000; else printf \"%dk\", n/1000}"); fi; branch=""; dirty=""; if git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$(git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then dirty="*"; fi; fi; printf "\033[1;36m%s\033[0m" "$display_dir"; if [ -n "$branch" ]; then printf " \033[35m %s\033[0m" "$branch"; [ -n "$dirty" ] && printf "\033[31m%s\033[0m" "$dirty"; fi; printf " \033[2m%s\033[0m" "$model"; if [ -n "$used" ]; then if [ -n "$size_fmt" ]; then printf "\033[2m (ctx %.0f%% of %s)\033[0m" "$used" "$size_fmt"; else printf "\033[2m (ctx %.0f%%)\033[0m" "$used"; fi; fi
